info.title: GAIL (Lula API)
info.description:
Galactus External API for integrating with Gail's AI-powered calling platform. Manage calls, conversations, contacts, campaigns, sequences, and more.

## Authentication

All API requests require authentication using an API key. Include your API key in the `X-API-Key` header with each request.

get.summary: Returns the catalog of available audio files for background noise and tool call overlay.

get.summary:
Describe what will happen when a campaign runs.
Provides a detailed explanation of the campaign flow including:
- How contacts are sourced and converted to assignments
- What sequences will be used and their schedules
- What scripts will be executed at each step
- Redialing rules and actions after each outreach attempt
- Assignment lifecycle (open, closed, resolved states)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the campaign.

get.description:
Describe what will happen when a campaign runs.
Provides a detailed explanation of the campaign flow including:
- How contacts are sourced and converted to assignments
- What sequences will be used and their schedules
- What scripts will be executed at each step
- Redialing rules and actions after each outreach attempt
- Assignment lifecycle (open, closed, resolved states)

post.summary:
Start a campaign to begin outreach to contacts.
The campaign will begin processing contacts according to its sequences.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the campaign to start.

post.description:
Start a campaign to begin outreach to contacts.
The campaign will begin processing contacts according to its sequences.

post.summary:
Stop a running campaign.
Pending touchpoints will not be processed, but in-progress calls will complete.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the campaign to stop.

post.description:
Stop a running campaign.
Pending touchpoints will not be processed, but in-progress calls will complete.

Archived campaigns are hidden from default views but can be restored.

get.summary:
Get touchpoints (call/message attempts) for a campaign.
Touchpoints represent individual outreach attempts to contacts.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the campaign.

parameters.name: includeTranscripts
parameters.description: When true, includes call transcripts in the response.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: A GUID cursor to fetch items strictly after this ID.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: A GUID cursor to fetch items strictly before this ID.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to retrieve (default 50).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number (1-based).

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of items per page (default 50).

get.description:

parameters.description: Optional comma-separated expansions. Supported: contact, contact_id.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: A GUID cursor to fetch items strictly after this ID.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to retrieve (default 50).

delete.summary:
Delete a contact list and all its contacts.
This operation archives all contacts in the list page by page, then archives the list itself.
The operation runs in the background and may take time for large lists.
Check the contact list status to monitor progress - it will be "Deleting" while in progress.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the contact list to delete.

parameters.name: batchSize
parameters.description: Optional batch size for processing contacts. Defaults to 500.

delete.description:

get.summary:
List use cases with optional status filtering, pagination, and search.
When pagination or search parameters are provided, returns a paginated result.
When neither is provided, returns all matching use cases (backward compatible).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Optional search term to filter use cases by title or description.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional status filter (e.g., "active", "archived").

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: A GUID cursor to fetch items strictly after this ID.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: A GUID cursor to fetch items strictly before this ID.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to retrieve (default 50).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number (1-based).

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of items per page (default 50).

List use cases with optional status filtering, pagination, and search.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of calls to return (default: 50).

get.description: Get recent calls for Zapier triggers.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number to add (any format, will be normalized to E.164).

description.description: Optional description or notes about why this number was added.

AddDoNotCallRequest.description: Request to add a phone number to the Do Not Call list.

closedDescription.description: Conditions that cause an assignment to be "Closed".

resolvedDescription.description: Conditions that cause an assignment to be "Resolved".

postClosureDescription.description: What happens to touchpoints after an assignment is closed.

AssignmentLifecycleDescription.description: Describes the lifecycle of an assignment.

message.description: Get or sets blaster script message.

toolAssociations.description: Gets or sets the tool IDs associated with this script.

message.description: Get or sets blaster script message.

alreadyExists.description: Phone numbers that already existed in the list.

phoneNumbers.description: The phone numbers to remove (any format, will be normalized).

BulkRemoveDoNotCallRequest.description: Request to remove multiple phone numbers from the Do Not Call list.

removed.description: Phone numbers that were successfully removed.

notFound.description: Phone numbers that were not found in the list.

blockedNumbers.description: Phone numbers that were filtered out because they are on the Do Not Call list.

documentIds.description: Gets or sets the document Ids.

documentTags.description: Gets or sets the document tags.

status.description: Current status of the campaign (draft, active, stopped, archived).

sequences.description: Describes each sequence and what happens at each step.

CampaignDescriptionResponse.description: Describes what will happen when a campaign is executed.

items.description:
Defines a threshold for contact attempts.
The number of attempts will be maintained for each key.
When the number of attempts for a key reaches the threshold within the specified period, the defined action will be taken.

phoneNumbers.description: The phone numbers to check (any format).

CheckDoNotCallRequest.description: Request to check if phone numbers are on the Do Not Call list.

blockedNumbers.description: Phone numbers that are blocked (in E.164 format).

results.description: Mapping of original phone numbers to their blocked status.

invalidNumbers.description: Phone numbers that could not be validated.

CheckDoNotCallResponse.description: Response for checking phone numbers against the Do Not Call list.

contactListCount.description: Number of contact lists attached to this campaign.

description.description: Explanation of how contacts become assignments.

ContactSourceDescription.description: Describes the source of contacts for the campaign.

limit.description: The maximum number of attempts allowed within the specified period.

ContactThreshold.description:
Defines a threshold for contact attempts.
The number of attempts will be maintained for each key.
When the number of attempts for a key reaches the threshold within the specified period, the defined action will be taken.

includeContactId.description: Should the key include the contact's unique identifier.

includePhoneNumber.description: Should the key include the phone number for this attempt.

additionalDataKeys.description:
Lists the keys for additional data whose values should be included in the key.
The keys will be sorted alphabetically to ensure consistent key generation regardless of input order.

ContactThresholdKeyConfiguration.description:
Defines how the key for a contact threshold is constructed.
This allows for flexible definitions of thresholds based on different contact attributes.

excludeOutcomes.description:
By default, all outcomes are included in the threshold calculation.
This property allows specifying outcomes that should be excluded from the calculation.

ContactThresholdPhone.description: Defines a contact threshold for phone touchpoints.

ContactThresholdSms.description: Defines a contact threshold for SMS touchpoints.

hours.description: Gets or sets the time intervals.

DayOfWeekSchedule.description: Represents the schedule at a given day of the week.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +15551234567).

createdByEmail.description: Email of the user who created this entry.

updatedAt.description: When this entry was last updated.

updatedByEmail.description: Email of the user who last updated this entry.

DoNotCallResponse.description: Response representing a Do Not Call entry.

toolAssociations.description: Gets or sets the tool IDs associated with this script.

key.description: The key/name of the data point to extract.

extractionDescription.description: Detailed description of how to extract this data point from conversations.

ExtractionDataPointDto.description: DTO for a single data extraction point configuration.

items.description:
Defines a threshold for contact attempts.
The number of attempts will be maintained for each key.
When the number of attempts for a key reaches the threshold within the specified period, the defined action will be taken.

dataPoints.description: Collection of configurable data extraction points.

OrganizationExtractionDataPointsDto.description: DTO for organization extraction data points configuration.

actionDescription.description: Human-readable description of what happens for this outcome.

OutcomeActionDescription.description: Describes an outcome and its associated actions.

agentName.description: Gets or sets the agent's name.

useCaseAssociations.description: Gets or sets the UseCase associations.

giveSurvey.description: Gets or sets the GiveSurvey indicator.

postCallScripts.description: Gets or sets the list of post-call script actions to run after call ends.

calEventTypeId.description: Gets or sets the Cal.com event type ID for calendar scheduling.

details.description: Optional additional details for the FAQ.

PhoneScriptFaqRequest.description: Represents a request to create or update a script FAQ entry.

documentIds.description: Gets or sets the document Ids.

documentTags.description: Gets or sets the document tags.

toolAssociations.description: Gets or sets the tool IDs associated with this script.

agentName.description: Gets or sets the agent name.

useCaseAssociations.description: Gets or sets the UseCase associations.

giveSurvey.description: Gets or sets the GiveSurvey indicator.

postCallScripts.description: Gets or sets the list of post-call script actions to run after call ends.

calEventTypeId.description: Gets or sets the Cal.com event type ID for calendar scheduling.

PhoneScriptRequest.description: Represents Dto for creating or updating use case.

maxAttempts.description: Maximum total attempts across all phone numbers.

outcomeActions.description: Describes the possible call outcomes and what action is taken for each.

RedialingDescription.description: Describes the redialing rules for the campaign.

timing.description: Human-readable timing description (e.g., "Immediately", "After 30 minutes", "Day 2 at 9:00 AM").

outreachType.description: Type of outreach (phone, text, email, blaster).

scriptNames.description: Names of the scripts used in this step.

description.description: Description of what happens in this step.

ScheduleStepDescription.description: Describes a single step in a sequence schedule.

toolAssociations.description: Gets or sets the tool IDs associated with this script.

Script.description: Represents base DTO for script response.

rank.description: The rank/priority of this sequence (lower rank = higher priority).

criteria.description: Criteria expression that determines which contacts match this sequence.

criteriaDescription.description: Human-readable explanation of when this sequence applies.

steps.description: The scheduled steps in this sequence.

SequenceDescription.description: Describes a sequence and its schedule.

items.description: Represents base DTO for script response.

id.description: The unique identifier for the session.

userKey.description: The unique identifier of the user associated with the session.

metadata.description: Additional metadata associated with the session or user.

issuedAt.description: The timestamp when the session was issued.

expiresAt.description: The expiration timestamp of the session.

message.description: The text content of the SMS message to send.

to.description: The recipient phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +14155551234).

SmsSendRequest.description: Request to send an SMS message.

toolAssociations.description: Gets or sets the tool IDs associated with this script.

UpdateDoNotCallRequest.description: Request to update a Do Not Call entry.

UseCaseAssociation.description: Respresent use case association response dto.

id.description: Gets or sets the UseCase's Id.

order.description: Gets or sets the UseCase's Order.

UseCaseRequest.description: Represents create or update use case dto.

ApiKey.description: API Key authentication. Generate your API key in the Gail Portal under General > Integrations > API Keys.
ApiKey.name: X-API-Key

tags.name: AudioFiles
tags.description: Endpoints for browsing available audio files for script configuration.

tags.name: Calls
tags.description: Endpoints for initiating and managing outbound calls.

tags.name: Campaigns
tags.description: Endpoints for managing outbound campaigns. Campaigns orchestrate automated outreach to contacts using sequences and scripts.

tags.name: ContactLists
tags.description: Endpoints for managing contact lists. Contact lists are collections of contacts that can be used to target campaigns.

tags.name: Contacts
tags.description: Endpoints for managing contacts in your organization. Contacts represent individuals that can be called or messaged through campaigns and sequences.

tags.name: Conversations
tags.description: Endpoints for accessing conversation history and messages. Conversations represent interactions between the AI agent and contacts via calls or messages.

tags.name: DataExtraction
tags.description: Manage data extraction fields for phone scripts. Data extraction fields define what information Gail should extract from conversations, such as customer preferences, callback times, or custom data points.

tags.name: DoNotCall
tags.description: Endpoints for managing the Do Not Call list. Phone numbers on this list will be blocked from receiving outbound calls.

tags.name: Org
tags.description: Endpoints for managing organization settings and configuration. Each API key is associated with a specific organization.

tags.name: RedialingRules
tags.description: Endpoints for managing redialing rules. Redialing rules define how and when to retry contacting someone after an unsuccessful attempt.

tags.name: Scripts
tags.description: Endpoints for managing scripts. Scripts define the AI agent's behavior, objectives, and conversation flow for calls and messages.

tags.name: Sequences
tags.description: Endpoints for managing sequences. Sequences define the order and timing of outreach steps (calls, SMS, emails) in a campaign.

tags.name: Sms
tags.description: Send SMS messages to contacts. Messages are sent from your organization's configured phone number.

tags.name: UseCases
tags.description: Endpoints for managing use cases. Use cases define specific conversation scenarios and objectives that the AI agent can handle during calls.

tags.name: Webhook
tags.description: Endpoints for managing webhooks. Webhooks allow you to receive real-time notifications when events occur in your organization.

tags.name: Zapier
tags.description: Endpoints to expose call data to Zapier integrations.
